• Interactive C++ Linus rant meme generator
  • Dynamic text replacement in predefined rant text
  • URL parameter support for direct text input
    const inputField = document.getElementById('userInput');
    const targets = document.querySelectorAll('.replace');

This web application creates an interactive version of Linus Torvalds' famous C++ rant. Users can input text that replaces all instances of "C++" in the rant, with real-time preview functionality and URL parameter support for direct text input.
